name: Surface Mining
description: Basic extraction techniques allow workers to exploit iron, stone, and gold deposits on the surface. Unlocks the Mine building.

name: Organized Foresting
description: Systematic logging and replanting turns forests into a reliable source of timber income. Unlocks the Forestry building.

name: Record Keeping
description: Scribes and ledgers allow rulers to extract more research value from their capitals, generating an additional research point per capital each turn.

name: Agricultural Methods
description: Improved farming techniques and crop management boost yields from farms and gardens by 15%.

name: Library Studies
description: Investment in scholarly infrastructure unlocks the construction of Libraries, which generate research points each turn.

name: Crop Rotation
description: Rotating crops between seasons dramatically increases agricultural output. Unlocks a Farm building.

name: Banking System
description: Formal banking institutions enable capital accumulation at scale. Unlocks the Bank building.

name: Advanced Taxation
description: Sophisticated guild tax collectors extract a flat 10 gold from every owned province each turn.

name: Supply Logistics
description: Guild-run supply chains eliminate the cost of deploying troops between provinces.

name: Trade Monopoly
description: Total dominance of regional trade networks. All income is boosted by 10%.

name: Grand Treasury
description: A central treasury consolidates the nation's immense wealth. Unlocks the Treasury building.

name: Sword Training
description:
Train your soldiers in advanced swordsmanship, increasing attacking army power by 15% and unlocking the infantry type.
Infantry:
Attack:1.0
Defense:1.2
Cost for deploy 100: 75
Unkeep per 100: 100

name: Archery Doctrine
description:
Organized training in ranged warfare. Unlocks Archers for recruitment into armies.
Archers:
Attack:1.4
Defense:0.7
Cost for deploy 100: 75
Unkeep per 100: 125

name: Pike Formations
description:
Disciplined pike squares provide an unbreakable defensive line. Unlocks Pikemen for recruitment.
Pikemen:
Attack:0.9
Defense:1.8
Cost for deploy 100: 75
Unkeep per 100: 120

name: Heavy Cavalry
description:
Mastery of mounted warfare and armoured horsemanship. Unlocks Knights for recruitment (requires an Armory).
Knights:
Attack:2.0
Defense:1.5
Cost for deploy 100: 200
Unkeep per 100: 200

name: Veteran Officers
description: Experienced commanders improve coordination across all unit types, granting an additional 10% attack power.

name: Army Logistics
description: Streamlined supply chains and quartermaster corps reduce total army upkeep by 20%.

name: Improved Logistics
description: Unlocks road construction.

name: Best Logistics
description: Roads are better quality not, extend their reach by 1.

name: Merchant Guild Charter
description: A formal charter establishes the Merchant Guild as the ruling class. Streamlined economic administration reduces all upkeep by 15%. Commits your nation to the Merchant Guild path.

name: Trade House
description: Buy! Sell! Buy! Sell! Unlocks the Trade House building.

name: Mercenary Corps
description:
Why recruit when you can hire? Unlocks the Mercenary unit type.
Mercenaries:
Attack:1.8
Defense:1.8
Cost for deploy 100: 350
Unkeep per 100: 300

name: Spy network
description: Allows you to spy on other players army composition.

name: Holy Order
description: A devoted way for your God, heretics will burn, locks you to path of God! Unlocks piety.

name: Holy Order
description: A place to pray and worship. Unlocks the Temple building.

name: Paladins
description:
True followers of faith. Unlocks the Paladin unit type. Takes piety to recruit.
Paladins:
Attack:2.0
Defense:2.5
Cost for deploy 100: 250
Unkeep per 100: 250

name: Cathedral
description: Great palace of god!. Gives more piety and protection.

name: Noble House
description: Way of sword and fire. Locks you in noble path.

name: Noble Knights
description:
Most noble of all. Unlocks the Noble Knight unit type.
Noble Knight:
Attack:2.5
Defense:2.0
Cost for deploy 100: 250
Unkeep per 100: 250

name: Noble Castle
description: Best castle from best stone. Unlocks castle building.

name: Better training
description: Train your soldiers in advanced swordsmanship, increasing units power by 10%.
